top_signals.title: Oil prices rise after Rubio says Iran is not serious about a deal
top_signals.summary: The U.S. has launched strikes against Iran for 11 consecutive days, citing a need to "degrade Iran's ability to threaten commercial shipping."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: US 30-Year Yield Raises Alarm in Longest Run Above 5% Since 2007
top_signals.summary: The US 30-year bond yield is trading above 5% for the longest stretch since the dawn of the financial crisis, echoing investor concerns about a growing debt pile and sticky inflation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: US seeks forfeiture of $25 million in crypto tied to global fraud investigations
top_signals.summary: US prosecutors seek forfeiture of $25 million in crypto recovered from five investigations into international fraud and laundering networks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Upper House panel approves referendum reform bill
top_signals.summary: The bill to revise the law was backed by the ruling coalition as well as several opposition parties.
